modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log into CampusLabs for course evaluations

full_description_text: I can't access CampusLabs to complete my course evaluations. When I try to log in, I get an error saying my username or password is invalid. This is preventing me from accessing the IDEA course evaluation surveys and the D2L survey.

description: I can't access CampusLabs to complete my course evaluations. When I try to log in, I get an error saying my username or password is invalid. This is preventing me from accessing the IDEA course evaluation surveys and the D2L survey.
